variants: Jorge Moniz, a specialist in Arctic Ecology, has made significant contributions to environmental research. He is known for his invention, the Frostpetal Recording Panel, which aids in studying ecological data in frigid climates. His impactful work earned him the Twilight Helm Award, a testament to his expertise and dedication. Additionally, Jorge is a member of the Pearlstring Planners, a society that focuses on environmental sustainability. His academic journey was greatly influenced by his mentor, Samir Benradi, who guided him through his studies and professional development.
